images.alt:
A cinematic, moody scene of a lone man walking away from the viewer on a rain-soaked path, wearing a long dark trench coat and a fedora hat. His coat flows in the wind as rain falls, creating ripples in reflective puddles beneath his feet. The environment blends realism with abstract digital textures: geometric, circuit-like patterns form the ground and background, merging into a futuristic cityscape silhouette.
Lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, with a warm orange glow on the left side fading into cool teal-blue tones on the right. The sky is overcast and misty, with soft fog diffusing the light. A few dark pine trees are visible in the distance, partially obscured by haze.
Style is a mix of digital painting and textured impasto, with visible brush strokes and layered surfaces. Highly detailed, atmospheric, reflective surfaces, cinematic composition, depth of field, volumetric lighting, ultra-realistic textures with abstract elements.
